concerns.text: T013b introduces a staged implementation of FR-001 (specific XAI techniques) by explicitly forbidding SHAP/LIME and relying on a rule-based simulation. This is a weakening of the spec's requirement. The task description acknowledges this but does not include a corresponding update to the spec to reflect this deviation.

The spec (FR-002) mandates a Shapiro-Wilk + Levene's test decision flow, while the plan and tasks implement only Shapiro-Wilk + ANOVA. This is a direct contradiction and a weakening of the spec's requirement. The task description acknowledges this conflict but does not resolve it.

T019 and T019b both depend on `contracts/session.schema.yaml`, but the task descriptions do not explicitly state that the task will fail if the schema file is missing. This is a critical dependency that must be enforced to ensure data integrity (FR-006).

T025b is incomplete and lacks the full implementation details required to generate the expected outputs. The description states it is blocked by T036, but the dependency is not clearly articulated in the task description itself.
T027 is marked as completed but contains only a placeholder. This needs to be clarified and implemented to fulfill FR-004.
